'''Gaartatha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who worked as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His [[Gaartatha's companion|partner]] was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], a fate that the Wookiee barely escaped himself. Gaartatha dealt with this loss by finding solace in [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]], all the while hoping to find companions who could assist him in rescuing his partner. For a [[Time/Legends|time]], he joined up with fledgling [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Stannik Nhaa]].

==Biography==
Gaartatha was a hulking, shaggy, [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. He worked as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]],<ref name="Handbook" /> freelance [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], and shipper during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|305|Gaartatha}}</ref> alongside a [[Gaartatha's companion|close friend]]. The two companions had an altercation with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Slavery/Legends|press gang]] that was hunting for slaves for a work colony. Gaartatha's partner was captured in the encounter, while Gaartatha only barely escaped himself. Affected by grief, Gaartatha turned to [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]], while also looking for a lead and help to rescue his companion. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] of mourning, he visited a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and consumed several [[Dentarian Ripple]]s until he began to smell of the drink's odour. Also present in the cantina on that occasion was [[D'Voras Brin]], a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] extraordinare. While the Wookiee was waiting near the entrance of the cantina, [[Stannik Nhaa]], a young member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], entered, searching for Brin and hoping to find transportation offworld. Gaartatha allied with Nhaa and traveled with the Rebel for some time.<ref name="Handbook" />

==Personality and traits==
Gaartatha worked as a scout, gaining [[Technician/Legends|mechanical]] proficiency alongside knowledge of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]] and [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]]. Gaartatha was deeply affected by the capture of his companion by Imperial slavers. While he hoped for a rescue, the Wookiee knew that he was incapable of saving his partner on his own. In his grief, Gaartatha consumed copious amounts of alcohol.<ref name="Handbook" /> Translated into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], the prefix "Gaar" meant meant "brave/bold/fearless" and the suffix "tatha" meant "bite/biter/claw."<ref name="Callsigns">{{GamerCite|10|Callsigns: Names of Kashyyyk}}</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
He was a seasoned [[Unarmed combat/Legends|brawler]], but was also capable with both a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]], the latter a traditional Wookiee weapon.<ref name="Handbook" />

==Equipment==
Gaartatha wore an armless vest that had numerous pockets.<ref name="Handbook" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Steven H. Lorenz]] created Gaartatha for the ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'', a guidebook that was published in [[1993]] for the second edition of the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars'' roleplaying game]]. The Wookiee appeared in the chapter titled "Gamemaster Characters," which illustrated how to create characters to flesh out adventures. Lorenz described the Wookiee as being intended to function as an ally of Nhaa for an extended period of time. The chapter was accompanied by an image of Gaartatha and Brin in the cantina illustrated by [[Mike Jackson]].<ref name="Handbook" />
